title: OpenAPI Operation Object
description: Describes a single API operation on a path.

tags.description: A list of tags for API documentation control.

summary.description: A short summary of what the operation does.

description.description: A verbose explanation of the operation behavior.

operationId.description: Unique string used to identify the operation.

parameters.description: A list of parameters applicable for this operation.

callbacks.description: A map of possible out-of-band callbacks related to the operation.

deprecated.description: Declares this operation to be deprecated.

security.description: Security mechanisms applicable for this operation.

servers.description: Alternative servers to service this operation.
